data.raceComments: {"comment":"8. ZIPPING ADMIRAL has a terrific record this track and trip with five wins and three placings from eight starts. Recorded a 3 length win (18.08) in a Grade 5 last time at this track. Expected to go close. 3. MADAM ZELDA has missed the frame at her last two but did run well three back when second (18.47) in a Grade 5 at this track. Expecting sharp improvement this line-up. 1. TRIPLE PHANTOM was responsible for a modest effort most recently when fifth at this track over 320m behind Golden Blend (18.62) in a Grade 5. Was in the money the start prior. Safe beginner who draws ideally on the inside. Key runner who gets his chance to atone. 2. GLOW STICK is in the mix despite missing out at this track last time.","runners":[8,3,1,2],"exclusive":false}
